ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standard (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the county (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the election was conducted */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., general, primary) */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who voted in the election */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "is_special_election" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the election is a special election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method (e.g., absentee, in-person) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "is_early_voting" INTEGER /* Indicates whether early voting is allowed */,
  "is_absentee_voting" INTEGER /* Indicates whether absentee voting is allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_progress" (
  "voting_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting progress event */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being tracked */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being tracked */,
  "reporting" INTEGER /* Number of precincts reporting */,
  "precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts in the county */,
  "absentee_method" TEXT /* Method used for absentee voting */,
  "total_precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts in the county */,
  "reported_precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts that have reported their results */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used (foreign key to `voting_methods`) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_progress_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_progress_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being tracked */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being tracked */,
  "candidate" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters in the county for the election */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate FOREIGN KEY ("candidate") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handle of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboard" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being tracked */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate leading the election */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of victory for the leading candidate */,
  "leader" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is the leader */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the leading candidate */,
  "percentage_margin" REAL /* Margin of victory as a percentage */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the results are final */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboard_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
